name: remote-agent-collaboration
description: A small-team Codex collaboration layer for lead/member agent workflows, module-scoped work, task state, announcements, logs, and fail-closed role checks.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate a small human plus AI project team with lead and member Codex roles
interface.longDescription: Remote Agent Collaboration installs lead and member skills for Codex so small teams can manage multi-agent work in one repository. The lead role coordinates members, modules, announcements, reviews, and log compaction. Member roles work assigned tasks and append module-scoped logs. Hooks can provide session context when trusted and observed; collabctl remains the deterministic local enforcement layer and fails closed without a real session_id.
defaultPrompt: $team-lead-collaboration Initialize and govern collaboration for this project.
$team-member-collaboration Read current announcements and work only inside my assigned module.
